title: Estimation of losses of iodine during different cooking procedures.
search_query: Estimation of losses of iodine during different cooking procedures.
notes: Iodine is an essential micronutrient. The human requirement of iodine is 150 mcg/ day. About 90% of this comes from food while 10% from the water. The most commonly used method of prophylaxis against iodine deficiency is via fortification of salt with iodine. At the beneficiary l...
